query:
SELECT 
                id as "event_id: Id<Event<JsonValue>>", 
                ts_orig, 
                ts_ingest as "ts_ingest!"
            FROM core.events
            WHERE ts_orig > NOW() + INTERVAL '1 hour'
               OR ts_orig < '2020-01-01'::timestamptz
               OR ts_ingest > NOW() + INTERVAL '1 hour'
            LIMIT $1
